steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Pokedex Go Help Information
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 3607 during a race-instrumented cache stress case. Build deterministic Go evidence to verify generated help coverage, stable formatting, stream intent, and non-color meaning; no user-visible meaning may rely on color or cursor motion; then change one command, argument, EOF, or output-width condition and preserve the session contract. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
